title: RESOURCE PANTRY - 211info
text: SPRINGFIELD RESOURCE PANTRY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a shelf-stable food pantry, basic personal care items (such as toothbrushes and deodorant), and clothing. 1403 F Street Springfield, OR 97477 Eligibility: Homeless and at-risk youth ages 16-24 Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 686-2688 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 686-2688 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Lane County Services: Food Pantries * At Risk Youth Food Pantries * Homeless Youth General Clothing Provision * At Risk Youth General Clothing Provision * Homeless Youth Personal Care * At Risk Youth Personal Care * Homeless Youth Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - COUNSELING PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SPRINGFIELD
